title: ResourceRegistryRecord
description: Record of a resource registered in the R0 resource registry. R0 produces registration and classification only -- no execution, enablement, installation, or configuration. Register != Enable. Candidate != Adapter. Adapter != Capability.

resource_id.description: Unique resource identifier. Must be unique across the registry.

phase.description: The current integration phase (R0-R7) for this record. R0 records must use phase=R0.

resource_type.description: Classification of the resource by type. Determines which runtime layer and access mode categories apply.

path_or_reference.description: Filesystem path (e.g., D:\dev-frame\codegraph) or logical reference (e.g., 'bb_* MCP tools'). Paths use backslash separators on Windows.

path_status.description: Current status of the path or reference. 'verified' means both path exists AND content integrity has been confirmed.

runtime_layer.description: The runtime layer this resource belongs to in the RD2100 Agent Runtime v2 architecture.

access_mode.description: The maximum access mode permitted for this resource at its current lifecycle state. 'human_gated' requires an explicit human reviewer decision to escalate beyond this mode.

risk_level.description: Assessed risk level for this resource. Critical resources require human gate for any access mode escalation.

lifecycle_state.description: Current lifecycle state. R0 only operates in discovered/registered/classified/evaluated. States beyond 'classified' require later phases (R1-R7).

promotion_status.description: Promotion status within the current phase. R0 cannot set this beyond 'candidate'. 'approved', 'enabled', 'capability_approved', 'active', and 'installed' are NOT valid promotion_status values -- those are lifecycle_states or belong to later phases.

allowed_actions.description: Actions currently permitted on this resource at R0 (snapshot, read, classify, evaluate).

forbidden_actions.description: Actions explicitly forbidden on this resource at the current phase (execute, install, enable, configure, modify, delete).

human_gate_required.description: Whether any state transition on this resource requires human reviewer approval.

contract_mapping.description: References to integration contracts (e.g., 'A2: CodeGraph') that govern this resource's integration.

evidence_requirements.description: Evidence artifacts required before this resource can advance to the next lifecycle state (e.g., 'path-exists-verified', 'smoke-test-pass', 'contract-check-pass').

local_verification_status.description: Status of local verification checks for this resource. 'verified' means all local checks pass and integrity is confirmed. 'needs_local_verification' means registration is based on reference/secondary evidence without direct local scan. 'stale' means previously verified but checks need rerun.

verification_gaps.description: Known gaps in verification coverage for this resource. Each gap should reference a specific check that cannot currently be performed.

next_phase.description: The next phase (R1-R7) where this resource's promotion or capability enablement is planned. Used for roadmap tracking.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the resource, its role, and why it was registered.

notes.description: Optional notes, observations, or warnings about this resource.

registered_date.description: ISO8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this resource was first registered in the R0 registry.

then.errorMessage: R0 records may only use lifecycle_state: discovered, registered, or classified. States beyond classified (evaluated, quarantined, adapter_draft, adapter_dry_run, capability_proposed, capability_approved, active) are forbidden at R0.

examples.description: CodeGraph code intelligence library at dev-frame, 410 files indexed, active and verified.
